headline: AMD Helios AI Platform Collaboration Puts Valuation And Adoption In Focus
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NasdaqGS:AMD) and Celestica announced a collaboration on the Helios rack scale AI platform for large scale AI deployments. The Helios platform is designed around AMD Instinct AI accelerators and open standards based networking, including Ultra Accelerator Link over Ethernet. Helios is planned to be available to cloud, enterprise, and research customers in late 2026 as part of AMD’s expanding AI infrastructure ecosystem. Advanced Micro Devices enters this...
